DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL CONTRACT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 AND ORDER TO ACCEPT COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLEEN GOMEZ AKA COLLEEN LADEN $1,509.69 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $341.23 INTEREST, $315.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.92, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT COLLEEN GOMEZ' MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED, FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. DEFENDANT DID NOT RECEIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS. THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED ON OR ABOUT MARCH 5, 2013 IS SET ASIDE AS VOID. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR # 4761 (AFTER HEARING, COURT MODIFIED ITS RULING/ORDER: BOTH DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT SET ASIDE.)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lisa J. Espada, Esq. of the Law Office of Lisa Espada, Tel. 415.504.6195, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT COLLEEN GOMEZ' MOTION to SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Granted, for good cause shown. Defendant did not receive service of process. The default judgment entered on or about March 5, 2013 is set aside as void. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761
(After hearing, Court modified its ruling/order: Both default and default judgment set aside.)
